name: wmkf_app_user_preference
description: Per-user preferences for the Research Review App Suite. Holds encrypted secrets; requires User-level Read access on the security role (post-schema step).

attributes.description: Stored value. Encrypted blob when wmkf_IsEncrypted is true.
True when the preference value is AES-256-GCM encrypted.

notes: Access restriction (User-level Read) must be applied via security role after table creation — the metadata API does not configure role privileges.
No alt-key on (wmkf_preferencekey, ownerid): Dataverse rejects polymorphic PrincipalAttributes (ownerid) in composite keys. Per-user uniqueness on preference key is enforced app-side.
